title: Voyager Beach Tent – Super Easy Pop-Up, Large Space, UPF 50+ UV Protection, Premium Quality, Lightweight & Portable, Versatile Outdoor Shade, 2-Person, Compact Folded Size (Teal)
features: Super Easy Pop-Up Design — The Voyager Beach Tent sets up instantly with a hassle-free pop-up mechanism, providing quick, reliable shade for 2 people. Perfect for beach days, picnics, or outdoor events where convenience matters.

UPF 50+ UV Protection — Crafted with premium UV-blocking polyester fabric, this tent shields you from harmful sun rays, keeping you cool and safe during long hours at the beach or park under intense sunlight.

Spacious & Comfortable — With generous dimensions of 180 x 140 x 110 cm, enjoy ample room inside for adults and kids. The larger space design ensures comfort while relaxing or playing under the shade.

Durable & Wind-Resistant — Built with reinforced steel frame, sturdy seams, and sand pockets for extra stability, the tent withstands windy conditions and stays firmly anchored, ideal for active outdoor use.

Lightweight & Portable — Folds compactly for easy transport and storage. The tent comes with a carry bag, making it simple to bring along on vacations, hikes, or beach trips without added bulk or weight.
description: From the brand Previous page At Voyager, we believe in more than just selling gear – we inspire a lifestyle of exploration, connection, and discovery.
